series_metadata.series_description: Approved curriculum for certification in basic training programs. Information compiled to provide the units, hours, and student performance objectives for the basic curriculum recommended by the OPOTC , including but not limited to the curriculum effective date and suggested lesson plans. Every six months, curricula are potentially released with updates plans.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: ; Paper: paper 50 years from release date unless retained on microfilm. ; Microform: microfilm 50 years from release date unless retained on paper
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Shred
